name: JumpCloud Active Users Without MFA
description: Detects active JumpCloud users that do not have MFA enabled
query: SELECT id, username, email, activated, suspended, mfa_enabled FROM jumpcloud_users WHERE COALESCE(activated, true) = true AND COALESCE(suspended, false) = false AND COALESCE(mfa_enabled, false) = false
remediation: Enable MFA for all active JumpCloud users and enforce MFA enrollment with policy controls.
